hero.headline: Central Indiana's Premier Outdoor Living Experts
hero.subheadline: From custom landscape design to full-service maintenance, Property Pros has transformed thousands of outdoor spaces across Central Indiana since 2010. Inc. 5000 ranked and BBB A+ rated — your property is in expert hands.

services.headline: Complete Exterior Solutions
services.subtitle: From design to build to ongoing maintenance — one trusted team for every outdoor need.

cards.title: Landscape Design & Build
cards.description: Custom landscape plans and full installation that transform your property into a personalized outdoor retreat.

cards.title: Hardscape & Patios
cards.description: Expert construction of patios, walkways, retaining walls, and outdoor structures that elevate your property.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens & Living
cards.description: Design and build custom outdoor kitchen and entertainment spaces perfect for Indiana gatherings.

cards.title: Lawn Maintenance & Mowing
cards.description: Reliable weekly mowing and comprehensive lawn care to keep your property looking pristine all season.

cards.title: Fertilization & Turf Programs
cards.description: Seasonal treatment programs scientifically designed to keep your lawn healthy, green, and thriving.

cards.title: Drainage & Water Solutions
cards.description: Expert drainage design and water feature installation to protect your property and add visual appeal.

steps.title: Schedule Your Consultation
steps.description: Call us or fill out our form. We'll visit your property, listen to your vision, and assess the space.

steps.title: Receive Your Custom Plan
steps.description: Our design team creates a personalized proposal with detailed scope, timeline, and transparent pricing.

steps.title: Watch Your Vision Come to Life
steps.description: Our professional crews execute your project with precision while you enjoy watching your outdoor space transform.

about.label: About Property Pros
about.headline: From Small Mulching Company to Inc. 5000 Ranked
about.description: Founded in 2010 by Josh Springer, Property Pros grew from a small mulching operation into one of Central Indiana's premier outdoor design/build and landscape maintenance companies. Our personalized approach and commitment to quality earned us a spot on the 2020 Inc. 5000 list of America's fastest-growing private companies. Today, we serve residential and commercial clients with a full network of professionals dedicated to bringing your property dreams to life.

features.title: Inc. 5000 Ranked Company
features.description: Recognized as one of America's fastest-growing private companies on the prestigious 2020 Inc. 5000 list.

features.title: Full-Service Design & Build
features.description: From initial concept through installation and ongoing maintenance — one trusted team handles everything.

features.title: BBB A+ Rated
features.description: Consistently high customer satisfaction with 123+ verified reviews and a perfect Better Business Bureau rating.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing for Every Property
pricing.subtitle: Whether you need a one-time project or ongoing maintenance, we'll provide a detailed quote with no hidden fees or surprises.

guarantee.headline: Our Property Pros Promise
guarantee.description: We stand behind every project with a satisfaction guarantee. If you're not completely thrilled with our work, we'll make it right at no additional cost. Our 16-year reputation and Inc. 5000 ranking were built on delivering results that exceed expectations — and we intend to keep it that way.

faqs.question: What areas in Central Indiana do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the greater Indianapolis area including Fortville, Fishers, Carmel, Noblesville, Westfield, Zionsville, and surrounding communities throughout Central Indiana.

faqs.question: Do you handle both design and installation?
faqs.answer: Yes! We are a full-service design/build company. Our team handles everything from initial concept design through complete installation, so you have one point of contact throughout your entire project.

faqs.question: How long does a typical landscape project take?
faqs.answer: Project timelines vary based on scope. A basic installation may take 1-2 weeks while larger design/build projects can take 4-8 weeks. We'll provide a detailed timeline during your consultation.

faqs.question: Do you offer ongoing maintenance after installation?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We offer comprehensive maintenance programs including mowing, fertilization, mulching, leaf removal, and seasonal care to keep your investment looking its best year-round.

faqs.question: Can you work with my HOA requirements?
faqs.answer: Yes, we regularly work with HOAs and understand their guidelines. We've partnered with numerous neighborhoods and commercial properties across Central Indiana to beautify their greenspaces within their specific requirements.

testimonials.name: Teresa Kissick
testimonials.text: I am elated with the results of my landscaping project. Property Pros are the utmost professionals.

testimonials.name: Shawn Mendenhall
testimonials.text: We are absolutely thrilled with the work Property Pros did for us in transforming our outdoor space with exceptional service.

testimonials.name: Kim Hauser
testimonials.text: I am continually impressed with the level of professionalism, responsiveness and quality of work performed and their willingness to help beyond the scope of landscaping.

contact.headline: Ready to Transform Your Property?
contact.subtitle: Get in touch for a free consultation. We'll visit your property and provide a custom plan tailored to your vision and budget.

footer.description: Property Pros Land Management has been Central Indiana's trusted outdoor design/build and maintenance company since 2010. Inc. 5000 ranked and BBB A+ rated.
footer.service_area: Serving Central Indiana including Indianapolis, Fortville, Fishers, Carmel, Noblesville, Westfield, Zionsville, and surrounding communities.
